nasb.text: For they will drink and forget what is decreed, And pervert the rights of all the afflicted.

esv.text: lest they drink and forget what has been decreed and pervert the rights of all the afflicted.

cnv.text: 恐怕喝了酒，就忘記律例， 把困苦人的一切案件都顛倒了。

ccb.text: 免得喝酒后忘记律例， 不为困苦人伸张正义。

csbs.text: 免得他们喝了，就忘记所制定的律例， 又在所有困苦人的争讼上，颠倒是非。
